Display the schedules and vaccine assessment tools 
Consider syndicating the immunization schedules. 
This method ensures schedules on your site will always be current; whenever CDC updates a schedule, your page will automatically display the same update. Visitors can print the schedule from your web page.
For steps to easily place the current recommended immunization schedules and vaccine assessment tools on your website, see Display Immunization Schedules on Your Website .
